info.name: Ecommerce Distributed System — E2E Complete
info.description:
Complete end-to-end collection covering all 11 microservices routed through API Gateway (port 8081).

## Quick Start
1. Import this collection + `Ecommerce-Local` environment, then select the environment
2. Run folders **in order** with Collection Runner for the full E2E happy path
3. The **Register** pre-request auto-generates a unique email + coupon code every run
4. Test scripts auto-save every ID into both collection variables AND environment variables

## Order of execution
00-Auth → 01-Catalog → 02-Inventory → 03-Customer → 04-Cart → 05-Wishlist → 06-Coupon → 07-Order → 08-Payment → 09-Review → 10-Notification

## Initial values already set
`baseUrl` http://localhost:8081 · `runnerPassword` password123 · `brandName` Samsung · `categoryName` Electronics · `subCategoryName` Smartphones · `productName` Galaxy S24 Ultra · `couponCode` SAVE10 (overridden per run)

exec: var token = typeof data === 'string' ? data : data && (data.token || data.accessToken || data.jwt);
if (method === 'POST' && rawUrl.indexOf('/order-service/order') !== -1) { saveRunnerVar('orderId', data.id); saveRunnerVar('paymentId', data.paymentId); }
if (rawUrl.indexOf('/payment-service/') !== -1) { saveRunnerVar('paymentId', data.id || data.paymentId); saveRunnerVar('paymentStatus', data.status); }
if (method === 'POST' && rawUrl.indexOf('/coupon-service/coupon') !== -1) { saveRunnerVar('couponId', data.id); saveRunnerVar('couponCode', data.code || pm.collectionVariables.get('couponCode')); }
var notifications = Array.isArray(data) ? data : (data && Array.isArray(data.content) ? data.content : []);

item.name: 00 - Auth
item.description: User registration and authentication. All auth-service routes are open (no JWT required).

exec: // Generate unique runner data per run so repeated executions don't collide
var token = json && json.data && (typeof json.data === 'string' ? json.data : json.data.token);

item.name: 01 - Catalog
item.description: Brand, Category, SubCategory, Product, and Variant management. Brand/Category/SubCategory/Variant creation requires auth; Product list/search/get are public.

exec: try { pm.environment.set('brandId', json.data.id); pm.environment.set('brandName', json.data.name); } catch(e) {}
pm.test('Get Brand by Name: status 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Get Category by Name: status 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
try { pm.environment.set('productId', json.data.id); pm.environment.set('productName', json.data.name); } catch(e) {}

body.raw:
{
  "name": "{{productName}}",
  "description": "Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra flagship smartphone with AI features",
  "model": "SM-S928B-{{runId}}",
  "mrpPrice": 134999,
  "salePrice": 119999,
  "gstValue": 18,
  "status": 1,
  "discount": 10.99,
  "images": ["https://example.com/galaxy-s24-ultra-front.jpg", "https://example.com/galaxy-s24-ultra-back.jpg"],
  "hasVariant": true
}

item.name: 02 - Inventory
item.description: Stock management for products and variants.

item.name: 03 - Customer (Addresses)
item.description: Shipping address CRUD. Gateway injects X-User from JWT; no need to send it manually.

body.raw:
{
  "city": "Bangalore",
  "state": "Karnataka",
  "country": "India",
  "zipCode": 560001,
  "home": "Flat 42B, Tower-C",
  "streetLocality": "MG Road, Shivaji Nagar",
  "landmark": "Near Metro Station"
}

item.name: 04 - Cart
item.description: Shopping cart operations. All routes require auth.

exec: console.log('Cart add dependency not ready; retrying Add Item to Cart ' + (retryCount + 1) + '/' + maxRetries);
console.log('Cart add dependency not ready; retrying Re-add Item after Clear ' + (retryCount + 1) + '/' + maxRetries);
pm.test('Re-add Item after Clear: status 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Cart has an item after re-add', () => pm.expect(json.data.items.length).to.be.above(0));
console.log('Cart add dependency not ready; retrying Re-add Item ' + (retryCount + 1) + '/' + maxRetries);

item.name: 05 - Wishlist
item.description: Wishlist management. All routes require auth.

exec: try { pm.environment.set('couponId', json.data.id); pm.environment.set('couponCode', json.data.code); } catch(e) {}

item.name: 07 - Order
item.description: Order placement and lifecycle management. Creates order from current cart.

exec: console.log('Order dependencies not ready; retrying Create Order ' + (retryCount + 1) + '/' + maxRetries);
console.log('Cart add dependency not ready; retrying Re-add Item for Coupon Order ' + (retryCount + 1) + '/' + maxRetries);
pm.test('Re-add Item for Coupon Order: status 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));

item.name: 40b — Create Order with Coupon → verify discount applied

exec: console.log('Order dependencies not ready; retrying Create Order with Coupon ' + (retryCount + 1) + '/' + maxRetries);
pm.test('Create Order with Coupon: status 201', () => pm.response.to.have.status(201));
console.log('orderId:', json.data.id, '| discount:', json.data.discount, '| total:', json.data.orderTotal);
pm.test('Get Cancelled Order Payment: status 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));

item.name: 08 - Payment
item.description: Payment lifecycle: initiate → confirm / fail → refund.

item.name: 48 — Get Payment Status by Order ID
50 — Initiate Payment for Failure → save paymentId

exec: pm.test('Initiate Payment for Failure: status 201', () => pm.response.to.have.status(201));

item.name: 09 - Review
item.description: Product reviews with moderation workflow. Submit → Moderate (APPROVED/REJECTED) → Read.

exec: console.log('Review eligibility not ready; retrying Submit Review ' + (retryCount + 1) + '/' + maxRetries);

item.name: 10 - Notification
item.description: User notification inbox. Notifications are generated by order/payment events.

exec: console.log('Notifications not available yet; retrying ' + (retryCount + 1) + '/' + maxRetries);
pm.test('Notification available for mark-read step', function () { pm.expect(notifications.length).to.be.above(0); });
